# cdp_datahub_config (Data Source)

Retrieve configuration of an existing Datahub cluster.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `crn` (String) CRN of the Datahub cluster.
- `name` (String) Name of the Datahub cluster.

### Read-Only

- `aws` (Attributes) AWS Datahub cluster configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--aws))
- `azure` (Attributes) Azure Datahub cluster configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--azure))
- `gcp` (Attributes) GCP Datahub cluster configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--gcp))

<a id="nestedatt--aws"></a>
### Nested Schema for `aws`

Read-Only:

- `cluster_template` (String)
- `crn` (String)
- `environment` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `instance_group` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--aws--instance_group))
- `multi_az` (Boolean)
- `name` (String)
- `security` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--aws--security))
- `status` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--aws--instance_group"></a>
### Nested Schema for `aws.instance_group`

Read-Only:

- `availability_zones` (List of String)
- `instance_group_name` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--aws--security"></a>
### Nested Schema for `aws.security`

Read-Only:

- `se_linux` (String)
